source_jobs.description: <p>If you're interested in learning more about opportunities at Rectangle Health— or don't see any roles currently listed on our Careers page that you're a fit for but would like to be considered for future opportunities — please don't hesitate to apply here! We'll keep your resume on file, and reach out if something becomes available that looks like a good match for your skills &amp; experience.</p><div class="content-conclusion"><p><a href="https://www.rectanglehealth.com/california-applicant-privacy-notice/">View our CCPA disclosure notice here</a></p></div>
